VA Disability Calc & Track

The most comprehensive VA disability calculator with BVA-accurate calculations, payment estimates, and claim tracking tools

📱 Download on the App Store

Powerful Features for Veterans

🧮

Dual Calculation Methods

Calculate your VA disability rating using both BVA (precise) and Table (standard) methods for the most accurate results

💰

Payment Calculator

Instantly estimate monthly compensation based on your rating and dependents (spouse, children, parents)

🔍

Search 900+ VA Codes

Find diagnostic codes by condition, symptoms, or code number. Browse by body system or search directly

📄

Document Vault

Scan and store VA documents with military-grade AES-256 encryption. Tag and organize for easy retrieval

📝

Notes & Reminders

Track appointments, symptoms, and claim progress with timestamped notes and push notification reminders

💾

Save Profiles

Create multiple calculation scenarios to compare current vs. potential ratings and track progression over time

Why Veterans Choose Our App

  • Stay Organized Effortlessly: Keep all your VA information in one secure place – calculations, codes, documents, and notes with smart tagging and instant search
  • Find Any Reference Instantly: Search 900+ VA disability codes, browse 38 CFR regulations, and access 70+ categorized resources – no more endless googling
  • Track Your Claims Journey: Interactive 7-phase checklist guides you from pre-separation through VHIC card with progress tracking and export features
  • Document Vault with Smart Sharing: Scan, encrypt, tag, and organize all VA documents – share securely when needed while originals stay protected
  • Profile Tracking Made Simple: Save unlimited calculation scenarios to compare current vs potential ratings – perfect for tracking progression over time
  • Built-in DBQ & Claims Guides: Step-by-step walkthroughs with real examples, document checklists, and common mistakes to avoid
  • Everything Works Offline: No internet required – all your data stays on your device with military-grade encryption
  • Quick Access Dashboard: See saved codes, recent calculations, and important documents at a glance from the home screen
  • Never Miss a Deadline: Set reminders for appointments, claim deadlines, and follow-ups with push notifications
  • Export for VSO Meetings: Generate reports of your calculations, checklists, and notes to share with representatives

See It In Action

🔒 Your Privacy is Protected

Military-Grade Security: Documents are encrypted with AES-256-GCM encryption. All data stays on your device. We cannot see, access, or collect any of your information. Enable Face ID/Touch ID and PIN protection for additional security.

Learn more and read our whole Privacy Policy at: bulwarkblack.com/va-disability-calc-track .

Trusted by Veterans Since 2025

Start Maximizing Your VA Benefits Today

Join thousands of veterans who use our app to understand and track their VA disability ratings

📱 Download Free on the App Store

Compatible with iPhone and iPad • iOS 17.0+ • No subscription required

Disclaimer: This app is an independent tool that provides estimates based on VA disability calculation methods. It is not affiliated with or endorsed by the Department of Veterans Affairs (VA). For official information and decisions, always consult the VA or a certified representative.

© 2026 Bulwark Black LLC. All rights reserved.

content.rendered:
Privacy Policy for VADisabilityCalculator

Last updated: July 14, 2025

Our Commitment to Your Privacy

Bulwark Black LLC (“we,” “our,” or “us”) operates the VADisabilityCalculator mobile application (the “App”). We understand that you are trusting us with potentially sensitive information related to your military service and disability status.

We want to be absolutely clear: we do NOT collect, store, transmit, or have any access to your personal disability information, calculations, or documents.

This privacy policy explains in detail what limited information we do collect (only for advertising and purchase processing purposes) and, more importantly, what we explicitly do NOT collect.

What We DO NOT Collect

We DO NOT collect, store, or have access to:

1. Your Disability Information

  • ❌ Disability ratings or percentages you enter
  • ❌ Types of disabilities or conditions
  • ❌ Extremity information (upper/lower, left/right)
  • ❌ Any medical conditions or symptoms
  • ❌ VA disability codes you search or save

2. Your Calculations

  • ❌ Combined disability rating calculations
  • ❌ Payment calculations
  • ❌ Dependent information
  • ❌ Any calculation history or results

3. Your Documents

  • ❌ Any documents you scan or store
  • ❌ PDF files or annotations
  • ❌ Photos or images you upload
  • ❌ Any files stored in the app

4. Your Personal Information

  • ❌ Your name or identification
  • ❌ Your email address
  • ❌ Your location (beyond general region for ads)
  • ❌ Your military service information
  • ❌ Your contact information
  • ❌ Your VA claim information

5. Your App Usage Details

  • ❌ Which features you use
  • ❌ Your saved profiles or calculations
  • ❌ Your notes or reminders
  • ❌ Sites you visit within the app
  • ❌ Your search queries for disability codes

How We Ensure Your Privacy

All your data stays on YOUR device:

  • ✅ Calculations are performed locally on your device
  • ✅ Saved profiles are stored only on your device
  • ✅ Documents remain only on your device
  • ✅ Notes and reminders stay on your device
  • ✅ Your PIN/biometric security is device-only

We have ZERO servers that store your data:

  • We do not operate any servers that collect user data
  • We do not use any analytics that track your calculations
  • We do not have any database of user information
  • We cannot see, access, or retrieve your data even if we wanted to

What We DO Collect

1. Advertising Data (Only for Advertising)

Advertising Identifier (IDFA) – Only if you grant permission via iOS App Tracking Transparency:

  • Used solely by Google AdMob to show relevant ads
  • You can deny this permission with no impact on app functionality
  • You can change this permission anytime in iOS Settings

Basic Device Information for Ad Delivery – Collected by Google AdMob, not by us:

  • Device type (e.g., iPhone 14)
  • iOS version (e.g., iOS 17.0)
  • Screen size and orientation
  • Language and time zone
  • General geographic region (country/state level)

Ad Interaction Data – Handled entirely by Google AdMob:

  • Whether an ad was shown
  • Whether an ad was clicked
  • Ad performance metrics

2. Purchase Data (RevenueCat)

For processing in-app purchases and managing your ad-free status, RevenueCat collects:

  • Anonymous User ID: A random identifier created by RevenueCat (not linked to your Apple ID or personal information)
  • Purchase Receipt: Apple’s purchase receipt to verify and restore your purchases
  • Purchase Events: When you purchase or restore the ad-free version
  • Device Information: Basic device model and OS version for purchase compatibility

Important about RevenueCat:

  • RevenueCat does NOT receive any of your disability data
  • RevenueCat does NOT receive your name or email
  • RevenueCat only knows you purchased “Remove Ads” – nothing else
  • Your Apple ID remains private – RevenueCat uses anonymous identifiers
  • All payment processing is handled by Apple – RevenueCat only verifies receipts

Third-Party Services

Google AdMob

We use Google AdMob solely to display advertisements. Google AdMob may collect device information as described above.

What AdMob DOES Collect:

Device & Usage Data:

  • Device identifiers (IDFA if allowed)
  • IP address and general location
  • App usage patterns (session length, ad interactions)
  • Device type, OS version, app version
  • Network type and carrier

Ad Performance Metrics:

  • Ad impressions and clicks
  • Ad revenue data
  • User interactions with ads

What AdMob DOES NOT Collect:

Your App’s Content Data:

  • User’s VA disability calculations
  • Saved profiles and ratings
  • Document contents (your encrypted files)
  • Personal notes or medical information
  • Any data stored in UserDefaults or Core Data

User-Entered Information:

  • Text from text fields
  • Selected conditions or percentages
  • Document tags or notes

Why Your Data is Safe:

  • Sandboxing: AdMob SDK runs in a sandboxed environment and cannot access your app’s private data storage
  • No Content Scanning: AdMob doesn’t scan or analyze the content within your app’s views or stored data
  • Your Encryption: Your document encryption (AES-256 GCM) ensures even if someone could access the files, they couldn’t read them

Learn more about Google’s data practices:

  • Google Privacy Policy: https://policies.google.com/privacy
  • How Google uses information from sites or apps that use their services: https://policies.google.com/technologies/partner-sites

You can opt out of personalized ads:

  • iOS: Settings → Privacy & Security → Tracking → Disable “Allow Apps to Request to Track”
  • Or purchase our ad-free version to remove all advertisements permanently

RevenueCat

We use RevenueCat to process in-app purchases and manage purchase status. RevenueCat’s practices:

  • RevenueCat Privacy Policy: https://www.revenuecat.com/privacy
  • RevenueCat only processes purchase-related data
  • No personal or disability information is shared with RevenueCat
  • Purchase data is linked to anonymous identifiers, not your personal information

Apple Technologies

We use standard Apple frameworks (Core Data, CloudKit if enabled) that keep your data on your device or in your personal iCloud account. We have no access to data stored via Apple’s frameworks.

In-App Purchases

When you purchase the ad-free version:

  • The transaction is handled entirely by Apple
  • RevenueCat receives only a receipt for verification
  • We do not receive any payment information
  • The purchase status is stored locally on your device and verified by RevenueCat
  • Your purchase can be restored on any device using the same Apple ID

Data Security

Your Data’s Security

Since all your personal and disability data remains on your device:

  • It’s protected by your device’s security (Face ID, Touch ID, PIN)
  • It’s encrypted by iOS when your device is locked
  • It’s included in your encrypted iCloud backups (if enabled)
  • It cannot be accessed by us, RevenueCat, or any other third party

App Security Features

  • Optional PIN/biometric lock for app access
  • Automatic lock when app goes to background
  • No network transmission of personal data
  • Purchase verification happens without sharing personal info

Your Rights and Choices

You have complete control:

1. Advertising Choices

  • Deny tracking permission (iOS 14.5+)
  • Purchase ad-free version
  • Use Limit Ad Tracking in iOS settings

2. Data Deletion

  • Delete any saved profile within the app
  • Clear all notes through the app interface
  • Uninstall the app to remove ALL local data permanently
  • RevenueCat data: Contact privacy@revenuecat.com for deletion requests

3. Data Portability

  • Export your calculations via the share feature
  • Save documents to your device’s Files app
  • All your data is already portable since it’s on your device

4. Purchase Management

  • Restore purchases on any device with your Apple ID
  • Cancel subscriptions through Apple (though we only offer one-time purchases)
  • Request refunds through Apple’s standard process

Special Commitments for Veterans

We recognize that our users are veterans dealing with sensitive disability information. We make these additional commitments:

  • No Data Mining: We will never analyze or mine disability data
  • No Selling Data: We will never sell any information to third parties
  • No Sharing: We will never share data with insurance companies, employers, or any other entity
  • No Profiling: We will never create profiles based on disability information
  • No Marketing: We will never use disability information for marketing
  • Anonymous Purchases: Even our purchase processor (RevenueCat) doesn’t know who you are

Children’s Privacy

Our App is not intended for children under 13. We do not knowingly collect any information from children under 13. The app is designed for adult veterans managing their VA benefits.

Changes to This Policy

We may update this privacy policy to reflect changes in our practices or for legal reasons. We will notify you of any material changes by:

  • Updating the “Last updated” date
  • Showing an in-app notification after update
  • Posting a prominent notice in the app

Legal Compliance

CCPA (California Consumer Privacy Act)

California residents have additional rights. However, since we don’t collect personal information beyond basic ad delivery data via AdMob and anonymous purchase data via RevenueCat, most CCPA rights related to data deletion and access are limited. You can still:

  • Opt-out of ad personalization
  • Request information about our privacy practices
  • Request deletion of RevenueCat anonymous purchase data

GDPR (General Data Protection Regulation)

For users in the European Economic Area:

  • Legal basis for ad data: Consent (via ATT prompt)
  • Legal basis for purchase data: Contract performance
  • Data controller for ads: Google AdMob
  • Data processor for purchases: RevenueCat
  • Your rights: Access, rectification, erasure, and portability (though we store no personal data)

Open Source Commitment

We are committed to transparency. The complete source code for data handling in our app shows that:

  • All calculations happen locally
  • No network calls transmit personal data
  • Storage is exclusively local
  • Only purchase verification uses network calls (no personal data transmitted)

Contact Us

If you have any questions or concerns about this privacy policy or our practices:

Bulwark Black LLC

  • Email: bulwark-black@bulwarkblack.com
  • Website: www.bulwarkblack.com
  • Mailing Address: 522 W RIVERSIDE AVE, STE N, Spokane, WA 99201, United States

For urgent privacy concerns:

  • Response time: Within 48 hours

For RevenueCat-specific privacy requests:

  • Email: privacy@revenuecat.com
  • Website: www.revenuecat.com/privacy

Summary in Plain English

What we do:

  • Show ads (if you haven’t purchased ad-free version)
  • Process purchases through RevenueCat (anonymous IDs only)

What we don’t do:

  • Collect, store, see, or access ANY of your disability information, calculations, documents, or personal data

Your data location:

Only on YOUR device

Our access to your data:

ZERO

Third-party data:

  • AdMob: Basic device info for ads (if you allow)
  • RevenueCat: Anonymous purchase verification only

How to remove all data:

Delete the app

How to stop ads:

Purchase ad-free version or deny tracking

Privacy Policy Version: 4.0

content.rendered:
At Bulwark Black, we take privacy and security seriously because the world demands it.
As communication and technology evolve, the world feels smaller, masked by a vast ocean of information. This isn’t about paranoia. It’s about preparation. In an age of complex geopolitical tensions, where data is currency and manipulation is strategy, knowing how to protect yourself isn’t optional, it’s essential.

We’re here to confront the real issues: the scams that slip past common sense, the “conspiracy theories” that sometimes hit closer to truth than we’d like, the social engineering attacks that exploit trust, and the risks that come with managing digital assets in today’s economy. More importantly, we’ll show you how to spot bad actors, navigate the threats, and build real-world resilience.

This section is your starting point. Break out of the matrix. Whether you’re just beginning your journey into personal security or you’re already deep in the trenches with digital assets and privacy tools, our goal is to arm you with practical knowledge. Not just so you can defend yourself but so you can move through the world with confidence.

The threats are real.
But so are the solutions.
You have more control than you think.

Becoming Self Sufficient

Digital Assets

Makes You Think

Social Engineering

The most important functionality is to load a received buffer, either as a DLL via the MemoryModule implementation, or as a shellcode.It uses AES for encryption and decryption of network traffic. LPEClient uses specific 32-bit values to represent its execution state (0x59863F09 when connecting via the WinHTTP interface, 0xA9348B57 via WinINet), or the nature of HTTP requests to the C&C servers (0xF07D6B34 when sending system information, 0xEF8C0D51 when requesting a DLL payload, 0xCB790A25 when reporting the successful loading of the DLL, 0xD7B20A96 when reporting the state of the the DLL execution). As the final step, malware looks for the export CloseEnv and executes it.

content.rendered:
Cyber threat intelligence is an intricate field, marked by a complex network of cybercrime syndicates and evolving malware. The terminology used to describe malware and cyber threat groups can vary widely, making it challenging to stay informed. Our mission is to deliver the latest and most accurate cyber threat intelligence. We provide insightful articles discussing recent breaches, emerging malware strains, current attack methods, and vulnerabilities that could influence global politics, organizations, or individual security.

On our site, each article is carefully curated to ensure you receive comprehensive and timely information. You’ll find a summary of the article, a direct link to the full text, and, when available, a file containing Indicators of Compromise (IOCs) identified in the article. This approach ensures that whether you’re concerned about broad geopolitical cyber threats or specific vulnerabilities that might affect your personal data, you have the intelligence at your fingertips to stay one step ahead.

Cyber Threat Intel Categories

Russian Cyber Threat Intelligence

Chinese Cyber Threat Intelligence

North Korean Cyber Threat Intelligence

Iranian Cyber Threat Intelligence

Malware

Anomalous Cyber Threat Intelligence

Operational Technology (OT) Threat Intelligence

content.rendered:
Bulwark Black LLC: Architecting a Proactive Defense

Bulwark Black LLC was built on the belief that the most resilient defenses are forged by those who deeply understand the mindset behind both attack and defense methodologies. An understanding of the Fundamentals in IT is critical.

This Fundamentals mindset foundation drives the work behind Bulwark Black LLC solutions. The mission is simple: transform passive protection into proactive, and intelligent command over the digital domains through security baked in software engineering. By using real time CTI turning IOC’s into result driven security alerting security feels easier.

AI isn’t just a buzzword at Bulwark Black LLC it’s a core part of the toolkit. From architecting and deploying AI infrastructure to integrating large language models into real-world security and development workflows, Bulwark Black LLC operates at the intersection of artificial intelligence and applied cybersecurity. Whether it’s building custom AI-powered tooling, automating threat analysis pipelines, or leveraging AI to accelerate software delivery, the focus is always on practical, high-impact implementation not hype.

AI is not easy and still requires expertise of fundamental IT and security concepts to fully utilize and implement AI properly.

From Intelligence to Implementation, We Are Your Partner:

  • Strategic Consulting & Advisory: Bulwark Black LLC brings deep, hands-on expertise directly to your organization. Through vulnerability assessments, architecture reviews, and C-level strategy sessions, we help you build a security posture that is both compliant and genuinely resilient against sophisticated attacks, Defense in Depth is your friend.
  • Real-Time Threat Intelligence: Stay ahead of the curve with our curated feed of actionable intelligence on emerging threats, malware, and TTPs, allowing you to prepare your defenses before an attack occurs.
  • Software Development: We design and build secure, purpose-driven applications from the ground up. Whether it’s security tooling, threat intelligence platforms, or custom solutions, our software is engineered with security at its core, not bolted on as an afterthought.

Build Your Bulwark

Whether you are an organization needing to secure your assets, a team launching a new application, or a professional dedicated to mastering the craft of cybersecurity and software development, Bulwark Black LLC provides the tools, expertise, and intelligence to help you achieve your goals.

Welcome to Bulwark Black LLC.
